cardNumber.description: 16 or 19 digit PAN number that will have its segment replaced.

oldSegmentCode.description: Unique identifier representing a group of benefit bundles that will be expired and replaced.

newSegmentCode.description: Unique identifier representing the new group of benefit bundles that will be assigned.

effectiveDate.description: Date at which the new segment will go in effect. Date should be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
